title: CO-001 Rooftop Pool Structural Upgrade
description: Structural upgrade to Level 5 pool deck to support additional 6000 lbs from revised pool equipment schedule. Reinforced beams and added shoring.

title: CO-002 Ballroom Upgraded AV & Rigging
description: Owner requested upgrade from standard ballroom rigging to full theatrical rigging system with motorized battens LED wash lighting and 400-amp company switch for events. Hotel operator requirement.

title: CO-003 Spa Wet Area Dehumidification Upgrade
description: Mechanical system upgrade from 3-ton to 5-ton dehumidification in spa wet area to comply with ASHRAE 62.1 and Florida Building Code requirements.

title: CO-004 Restaurant Kitchen Hood Rerouting
description: Reroute kitchen exhaust duct from Level 1 restaurant around structural conflict at Level 2. Includes structural penetration sleeve and 8-foot horizontal re-routing above Level 2 ceiling.

title: CO-005 Guest Room USB Outlet Upgrade
description: Add USB-A and USB-C outlets at all 380 guest room and suite headboards per Marriott Autograph Collection brand standards. Includes additional wiring and upgraded outlet assemblies.

title: CO-006 Lobby Feature Water Wall
description: Owner requested 30-foot feature water wall in main lobby with specialty stone cladding. Replaces original art installation allowance. Includes waterproofing pump system and lighting integration.

title: CO-007 Electric Vehicle Charging Station - Garage
description: Addition of 40 Level 2 EV charging stations in hotel parking garage per Miami-Dade County EV readiness ordinance. Owner decided to fully install rather than conduit-only.

title: CO-008 Rooftop Bar Expansion
description: Owner requested expansion of rooftop bar footprint from 3200 SF to 4800 SF with extended canopy shade structure additional bar stations and upgraded flooring. Submitted 1/15/2026 - pending approval.
